testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Dropdown Visibility should not render when isOpen is false
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Dropdown Visibility should not render when isOpen is false

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Dropdown Visibility should render when isOpen is true
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Dropdown Visibility should render when isOpen is true

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Empty Query Behavior should show no results message for empty query without API call
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Empty Query Behavior should show no results message for empty query without API call

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Empty Query Behavior should show no results message for whitespace-only query without API call
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Empty Query Behavior should show no results message for whitespace-only query without API call

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Debounce Behavior should debounce API calls when query changes
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Debounce Behavior should debounce API calls when query changes

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Debounce Behavior should call API after debounce delay (300ms)
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Debounce Behavior should call API after debounce delay (300ms)

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Debounce Behavior should reset debounce timer on rapid query changes
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Debounce Behavior should reset debounce timer on rapid query changes

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Loading State should show loading indicator during API fetch
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Loading State should show loading indicator during API fetch

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Loading State should hide loading indicator after fetch completes
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Loading State should hide loading indicator after fetch completes

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Results Display should display search results after successful API response
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Results Display should display search results after successful API response

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Results Display should display track title correctly
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Results Display should display track title correctly

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Results Display should display artist and album info correctly
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Results Display should display artist and album info correctly

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Results Display should display track duration correctly
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Results Display should display track duration correctly

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Results Display should show singular RESULT text for single track
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Results Display should show singular RESULT text for single track

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests No Results State should display 'No results found' when API returns empty array
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests No Results State should display 'No results found' when API returns empty array

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Error State should display error message when API call fails
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Error State should display error message when API call fails

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Error State should display generic error message for non-Error exceptions
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Error State should display generic error message for non-Error exceptions

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Track Selection should call onTrackSelect callback when track is clicked
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Track Selection should call onTrackSelect callback when track is clicked

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Track Selection should call onClose callback when track is clicked
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Track Selection should call onClose callback when track is clicked

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Query Changes should fetch new results when query changes
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Query Changes should fetch new results when query changes

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Query Changes should clear error when query becomes empty
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Query Changes should clear error when query becomes empty

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Race Condition Handling should cancel previous request when query changes rapidly
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Race Condition Handling should cancel previous request when query changes rapidly

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return track search results with populated artist and album info
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return track search results with populated artist and album info

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should use prefix-based matching (case-insensitive)
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should use prefix-based matching (case-insensitive)

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should limit results to maximum 5 tracks
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should limit results to maximum 5 tracks

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return empty array for empty query
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return empty array for empty query

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return empty array for whitespace-only query
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return empty array for whitespace-only query

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return empty array when no matches found
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return empty array when no matches found

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return 401 Unauthorized without token
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return 401 Unauthorized without token

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return 401 Unauthorized with invalid token
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return 401 Unauthorized with invalid token

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should handle special characters in search query
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should handle special characters in search query

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return empty array without q parameter
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return empty array without q parameter
